The intent states "Safe if velocity ≤ 4", yet the `step` treats a velocity of exactly 4 as a crash, which should be a safe landing. Antonycc recommends fixing the boundary to `velocity <= 4` (inclusive) for `landed`, and `> 4` for `crashed`, ensuring all other tests remain green. Additionally, antonycc commented on issue #19, clarifying the boundary for safe landings. The landing is safe when velocity is `<= 4` (inclusive), meaning a velocity of exactly 4 must set `landed=true`, not `crashed`.
